---
title: ""
navbar: false
format: 
  closeread-html:
    remove-header-space: true
    cr-section:
       layout: "overlay-center"
    cr-style:
      section-background-color: white
      narrative-background-color-overlay: white
      narrative-overlay-max-width: 700px
      narrative-text-color-overlay: black
      narrative-font-family: Times, "Times New Roman", Georgia, serif;
      narrative-font-size: 1.8em
---

::::{.cr-section}

Hello there 👋 

...this is about BSF Leaders Retreat 2026...

...if you have already RSVP-ed...

Well done 🤩🤩🤩

![](media/cat-clap.webp){fig-align="center" width="200%"}

...if you haven't yet, please RSVP ASAP on [Whatsapp](https://web.whatsapp.com/)!!! 

...now for the exciting bit...

For more details on the retreat, click on this handsome lad 👇

[![](media/sze.jpg)](info.qmd)
